name: ARC Resources Ltd.
description: ARC Resources Ltd. is a leading Canadian energy producer focused on the exploration, development, and production of unconventional natural gas, condensate, and natural gas liquids. Operating primarily in the Montney resource play in northeast British Columbia and northwest Alberta, the company is one of Canada's largest natural gas producers. ARC Resources is committed to delivering strong financial and operational performance while maintaining high environmental, social, and governance standards.
